context: Tests whether the agent includes the BuildKit syntax directive, generates an Optimization Metrics table with image size estimates, and produces a Next Steps checklist. The task explicitly asks for a decision document, making these normally implicit outputs highly visible and gradeable.

checklist.name: Syntax directive present
checklist.description: Dockerfile starts with or contains '# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1' (or a versioned variant)

checklist.name: Image size estimate provided
checklist.description: The decision document (or Dockerfile comments) includes an estimated image size in MB and compares it to a full Node.js image size

checklist.name: Cache layer explanation
checklist.description: The decision document describes which layers are cache hits on code-only changes vs. dependency changes

checklist.name: Next steps checklist
checklist.description: The decision document includes a bulleted or checkbox list of next steps before production (e.g., local build test, CI pipeline, vulnerability scanning)

checklist.name: Security summary
checklist.description: The decision document includes at least two of: non-root user, minimal base image, no hardcoded secrets — as security properties

checklist.name: Multi-stage build
checklist.description: Dockerfile uses multiple FROM stages (deps/builder/runner or similar) for the Next.js build

checklist.name: Pinned base image tags
checklist.description: All FROM instructions use specific version tags and NOT :latest

checklist.name: Non-root user in Dockerfile
checklist.description: Dockerfile creates a non-root user and includes a USER instruction before CMD

checklist.name: .dockerignore excludes Next.js build output
checklist.description: .dockerignore is present and contains at least .next/ or node_modules/ to prevent build artifacts from leaking into build context

checklist.name: Dependency layer caching order
checklist.description: package.json/package-lock.json is COPYed before COPY . . in the build stage
